home.aboutText: Our Bed & Breakfast in Castiglione della Pescaia is our life's choice. A seafront property, transformed from generation to generation, embodying the charm of traditional family-run hospitality. Courtesy, comfort, and warmth are our guiding values.
home.roomsSubtitle: For couples, friends, or families — we'll find the room that suits you best
home.apartmentsSubtitle: Independent spaces for longer stays and larger groups
home.surroundingsSubtitle: In the heart of the Maremma Toscana
home.surroundingsText: Castiglione della Pescaia, awarded 5 Sails by Legambiente and the European Blue Flag, is one of the top tourist destinations in the Touring Club guide. Nature, culture, cuisine, and medieval villages within reach.
home.ctaBannerText: Check availability and book directly online.
home.contactText: We'll be happy to answer any questions and help you choose the best option for your stay.

about.title: About Us
about.metaDescription: Discover the story of our B&B in Castiglione della Pescaia: family hospitality since 1988, directly on the Maremma Toscana sea.
about.section1Text: Our Bed & Breakfast in Castiglione della Pescaia is our life's choice. An old seafront house, transformed from generation to generation into a modern property that embodies the charm of traditional family-run hospitality.
about.section2Text: Courtesy, comfort, and warmth are our guiding values. Making your holiday an unforgettable experience is our goal. The sound of the sea will be the soundtrack of your stay.
about.section3Text: Fully renovated spaces, comfortable environments suited to couples, families, and groups. All rooms feature air conditioning, Wi-Fi, TV, minibar, and private bathroom. Breakfast, served in the main dining room overlooking the sea, is always included. Private parking guaranteed.

rooms.title: Rooms
rooms.metaDescription: Discover our B&B rooms in Castiglione della Pescaia: double rooms with sea view, balcony, air conditioning and breakfast included.
rooms.subtitle: Renovated spaces, modern comforts, sea views
rooms.intro: Our rooms face directly onto the sea. All rooms feature air conditioning, free Wi-Fi, TV, minibar, and private bathroom. Breakfast, served in the main dining room overlooking the sea, is always included. Private parking guaranteed. Our rooms accommodate up to 3 guests.

apartments.title: Apartments
apartments.metaDescription: Seafront apartments in Castiglione della Pescaia for families and groups. Fully equipped kitchen, pets welcome, private parking.
apartments.subtitle: Independence and comfort steps from the beach
apartments.intro: Our apartments are fully equipped and located just metres from the beach. They are the ideal solution for larger families or longer stays. Small pets are welcome in the apartments.

surroundings.title: Surroundings
surroundings.metaDescription: Discover attractions near our B&B in Castiglione della Pescaia: beaches, nature reserves, medieval villages and great Maremma Toscana cuisine.
surroundings.subtitle: A land waiting to be explored
surroundings.intro: Castiglione della Pescaia is located in the heart of the Maremma Toscana, awarded 5 Sails by Legambiente and the European Blue Flag. Just 22 km from Grosseto, it is surrounded by unspoilt nature, historical sites, and picturesque villages.

contact.title: Contact
contact.metaDescription: Contact our B&B in Castiglione della Pescaia. Phone, email, address and FAQ to plan your stay in Maremma Toscana.
contact.subtitle: We are here to help
contact.intro: Contact us for bookings or further information. We will be happy to answer any questions and help you choose the best accommodation for your needs.

book.title: Book
book.metaDescription: Book your room or apartment at our B&B in Castiglione della Pescaia directly. Check availability and rates online.
